tipRules.tip: Johnston: Smooth drag is a big key to fighting big smallmouth on 6-lb test drop shot. Use a soft rod to absorb their runs and headshakes.

knowledge.insight: Johnston: For big smallmouth drop shot fishing, pairs a Daiwa Ballistic 2500 reel with a Cody Meyer Tatula Elite signature drop shot rod. The parabolic bend and smooth drag are critical on 6-lb test.
Johnston: The soft rod setup was critical to letting him downsize line to get more bites at the event. Having the soft rod to absorb runs and headshakes helped.
Johnston: Fishes two drop shot rods -- a Tatula Elite 7'0" with 8-lb test and a 6'10" light-action BLX with 6-lb test. The EXIST 3000 reel drag is absolutely key when fishing big smallmouth.
